x-enumeration-literals.name: Redemption Burn Instruction
x-enumeration-literals.description: A request to deduct value when rewards or credits are redeemed for goods, services, or cash equivalents.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Payment Application Burn Instruction
x-enumeration-literals.description: A request to apply accumulated value (e.g., points or credits) toward a payment obligation, reducing the payable amount.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Fee Payment Burn Instruction
x-enumeration-literals.description: A request to use accumulated value to settle fees or charges.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Partial Burn Instruction
x-enumeration-literals.description: A request to consume only a portion of the available value.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Full Burn Instruction
x-enumeration-literals.description: A request to consume all available value in a single action.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Scheduled Burn Instruction
x-enumeration-literals.description: A request to deduct value automatically at predefined intervals or events.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Conditional Burn Instruction
x-enumeration-literals.description: A request to trigger value consumption only when specific conditions are met (e.g., thresholds, eligibility rules).

x-enumeration-literals.name: Expiration Burn Instruction
x-enumeration-literals.description: A request to remove value that has expired according to program rules.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Reversal Burn Instruction
x-enumeration-literals.description: A request to reverse a previous burn (e.g., canceled redemption or error correction).

x-enumeration-literals.name: Adjustment Burn Instruction
x-enumeration-literals.description: A request to correct or modify previously deducted value.
